title: WardenLib
description: WardenLib is a lightweight developer library for Minecraft plugins that provides reusable utilities and APIs for server management and gameplay enhancements.
body:
This plugin is required for WardenEssentials to work

🔹 Features

Scoreboard API – easily create and manage dynamic player scoreboards, configurable via scoreboard.yml.

Config Utilities – simplifies reading and updating YAML configuration files.

Player Utilities – helper methods for messages, teleportation, vanish, and more.

Expandable – intended to grow with additional modules to support future Warden-based plugins.

Standalone – can be used by any plugins i create, not just WardenEssentials.
